answer: NVIDIA data center revenue growth was driven by compute demand for generative AI and accelerated computing workloads, with additional support from networking demand as customers built larger AI clusters.
key_points: Compute products benefited from demand for generative AI and accelerated computing.
Networking revenue increased as AI clusters scaled.

citations.label: NVIDIA FY2025 10-K, p. 42
citations.excerpt: Data center revenue increased primarily from demand for compute products used in generative AI and accelerated computing workloads.

citations.label: NVIDIA FY2025 Q4 Earnings Call Transcript, pp. 6-7
citations.excerpt: Customers were deploying systems for training and inference, and networking attach rates increased as clusters scaled.
